title: Patient Transfer Leaves Stale Encounter Context
scenario: A patient is transferred to another department, but a clinical execution interface retains the previous encounter context.
initial_state: The clinical action was authorized during the original encounter.
state_transition: The patient was transferred and the active encounter changed before execution.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated against the current encounter before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires continuity between authorization context and current patient encounter context.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the retained encounter context is stale after transfer.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must be blocked when encounter continuity is broken by patient transfer.
clinical_action: Execute order under stale encounter context
